criteria.description: BenchmarkStripedVsGlobalLock exists in engine/catalog/catalog_bench_test.go with Striped and GlobalLock sub-benchmarks
criteria.validation: go test ./engine/catalog/... -bench BenchmarkStripedVsGlobalLock -benchmem -run ^$ lists both subtests

criteria.description: New file does not break existing tests
go build/vet/gofmt clean across engine module
Striped shows meaningfully lower ns/op and/or fewer/no extra allocs vs GlobalLock under contention
criteria.validation: manual inspection of actual benchmark output numbers
